task_completion.description: The agent selects the correct map image file for the overlay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Image Overlay' properties or configuration window showing the file path '/home/ga/Documents/sf_1906_map.png' in the Link or Path field.

task_completion.description: The agent names the overlay correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the overlay properties window contains the text 'SF 1906 Historical Map'.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the transparency/opacity to approximately 50%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Transparency or Opacity slider/input in the overlay properties window is set to a value near 50% or 0.5.

task_completion.description: The agent rotates the overlay to align with the street grid (approx 9-11 degrees).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Rotation' field in the overlay properties shows a value between 9 and 11 degrees, or the overlay image is visually rotated clockwise to align with Market Street.

task_completion.description: The overlay is positioned over Downtown San Francisco.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view shows the overlay rectangle positioned over San Francisco (identifiable by Market Street, piers, or coordinates ~37.77N, 122.40W).

task_completion.description: The agent saves the overlay as a KMZ file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save Place As' dialog showing the filename 'sf_overlay.kmz' and the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: The agent uses the mapping software GUI to create the overlay.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth) with dialog boxes and map views, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent manually enters parameters rather than loading a pre-made file immediately.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the properties/configuration dialog being edited (e.g., typing the name, adjusting sliders).

integrity.description: The output file is generated through the application's export function.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' dialog is visible within the application context, rather than a file manager copy-paste operation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location is Downtown San Francisco (approx latitude 37.77, longitude -122.40). The historical street grid north of Market Street requires a rotation of approximately 9 degrees clockwise to align. The expected rotation value in the settings should be between 9 and 11 degrees.
